nasb.text: And each one had four faces. The first face was the face of a cherub, the second face was the face of a man, the third the face of a lion, and the fourth the face of an eagle.

esv.text: And every one had four faces: the first face was the face of the cherub, and the second face was a human face, and the third the face of a lion, and the fourth the face of an eagle.

cnv.text: 每一個基路伯各有四個臉孔：第一是基路伯的臉孔，第二是人的臉孔，第三是獅子的臉孔，第四是鷹的臉孔。

ccb.text: 每一个基路伯天使都有四张脸：第一张是基路伯天使的脸，第二张是人的脸，第三张是狮子的脸，第四张是鹰的脸。
